title: What two real men who know your sin actually do for you
caption:
The podcast can't do this. The accountability app can't do this. The anonymous comment section definitely can't do this.

Two real men who know your sin — not the sanitized version, the actual thing — change the trajectory of a man's life. Not because they're perfect. Because they're present.

The privacy you've been keeping is the thing keeping you stuck.

"Confess your sins to one another, that you may be healed." — James 5:16. Not performed, not blogged about. Confessed, to a man who'll pick up the phone.

Find them. Or be one for someone else first.

—

Save this for the brother who's been trying to do it alone.

#faith #godlymen #christianmen #brotherhood #accountability #scripture #manofgod
